subcodes.first_line: The fire of doubts and vain imaginings hath encompassed the world, and utter abasement hath seized all mankind, yet none perceiveth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: آتش ظنون و اوهام عالم را احاطه نموده و ذلت کبری خلق را اخذ کرده ولکن احدی شاعر
subcodes.subjects: @justice ['adl]; social justice and divine justice, @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration, @praise and encouragement, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day
